name: advpl-tlpp
description: Syntax highlighting, compiler commands, keybindings and a real debugger (breakpoints/step/variables, launch and web/PO-UI attach modes) for AdvPL and TLPP (TOTVS Protheus). Bundles the advplc compiler (linux-x64, linux-arm64, win32-x64, darwin-arm64) — works out of the box, nothing else to install.

commands.title: AdvPL: Attach debugger to running serve session

program.description: Path to the .prw/.prg/.tlpp file to compile and debug.

stopOnEntry.description: Pause on the first executed line.

port.description: Debug port of a running 'advplc serve --debug-port' session.

host.description: Host of the running serve session.

initialConfigurations.name: Attach to AdvPL serve session (web / PO-UI)

configurationSnippets.label: AdvPL: Debug current file
configurationSnippets.description: Compile and debug the currently open .prw/.prg/.tlpp file

configurationSnippets.label: AdvPL: Attach to serve session (web / PO-UI)
configurationSnippets.description: Attach the debugger to a running 'advplc serve --debug-port' session — breakpoints hit on the next browser page load/reload

body.name: Attach to AdvPL serve session (web / PO-UI)

advpl.compilerPath.description: Path to the advplc binary. Leave empty to auto-detect: searches upward from the open file for an 'advplc' binary, then falls back to the compiler bundled with this extension, then to PATH.

advpl.debugPort.description: Port used for 'AdvPL: Serve current file' to accept debugger attach connections (advplc serve --debug-port).
